name: jBPM
description: jBPM — open-source BPM suite from Red Hat. Supports BPMN 2.0, case management, and process simulation on top of Drools rules engine.

seo.title: jBPM — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: jBPM: jBPM — open-source BPM suite from Red Hat. Supports BPMN 2.0, case management, and process simulation on top of Drools rules engine.

when_to_use: BPMN process automation integrated with Drools rules engine
Case management for adaptive processes in Red Hat ecosystems
Enterprise workflow automation in JBoss/WildFly environments
Human task management with process simulation in jBPM Suite
Process analytics and reporting on workflow execution data

pros: Full BPM suite including case management
Drools rules engine integration out of the box
Backed by Red Hat (IBM) for enterprise support
cons: Steep learning curve for full stack adoption
Red Hat focus biases toward JBoss/EAP deployment
review.verdict: Serious BPM suite for Red Hat shops; overkill for teams that just need a BPMN engine.
review.best_for: Red Hat / JBoss shops needing BPM plus rules engine together
review.not_for: Teams wanting lightweight embeddable BPMN without Drools or EAP

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
